## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `ai-rsk scan` on a project with...
2. ...
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include the full terminal output if possible.

## Environment

- **OS**: (e.g., Ubuntu 24.04, macOS 15, Windows 11)
- **ai-rsk version**: (`ai-rsk --version`)
- **Rust version** (if built from source): (`rustc --version`)
- **External tools**: (`semgrep --version`, `gitleaks version`, `osv-scanner --version`)

## Additional Context

Any other information (config file, project structure, etc.)
